channel.title: daviddias/awesome-hacking-locations Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Get the latest updates for popular awesome list

item.title: daviddias/awesome-hacking-locations Sep 21st - Sep 27th, 2020
item.description:
Tallinn

K-Space

  • Various equipment to print, engrave and cut (everything but yourself)

item.title: daviddias/awesome-hacking-locations Mar 16th - Mar 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Tallinn

K-Space

  • Chaostreff weekly on Thursdays @ 18:00
  • The only hackerspace with a server room (according to hackerspaces.org)
  • Bees, honey
  • Quiet office, if you don't have time for fun

item.title: daviddias/awesome-hacking-locations Oct 9th - Oct 15th, 2017
item.description:
Massachusetts

Diesel Cafe

  • Contact @richlitt for wifi password if needed.
  • You get 45m of free wifi per day. More if you know what you're doing ;) (but $14/mo for wifi is worth it if you hack there often)
  • Using IPFS will get you kicked off their network in ~2hr (FYI).
